overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in futuristic armor exploring a space station interior. The character walks through metallic corridors, a central atrium with a holographic planet display, and reaches an observation deck overlooking space.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station reception lobby and corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the station lobby and into a corridor lined with display cases and planters

entered.detail: dark metal reception counter with red accent lighting
green foliage in a rectangular planter
glowing red digital signage on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a space station lobby with a reception desk and red neon signage, then proceeds into a narrow metallic corridor lined with glass display cases and potted plants. The environment is artificially lit with a cool industrial aesthetic.

events.description: exits narrow corridor into large open atrium with holographic planet display visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor approaching the open atrium area with increasing natural light from skylights

entered.detail: large rotating holographic projection of a planet
bright overhead lighting panels illuminating the space

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the enclosed corridor into a transitional space where the ceiling opens up to skylights. A massive holographic planet display becomes visible in the distance, marking the entrance to the central atrium.

scene_state.functional_zone: central atrium with rental facilities and holographic displays

events.description: passing the large holographic planet display and traveler rentals counter on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway past the rental facilities and overlooking the garden area below

entered.detail: row of interactive rental terminals with screens
raised planters with green vegetation below the walkway
raised pedestrian bridge with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the spacious central atrium on an elevated walkway, passing the Traveler Rentals facility and a large holographic planet display. The area features garden beds below and mixed lighting from overhead skylights.

scene_state.functional_zone: service corridor with advertisements leading to hangar

events.description: entering darker corridor with neon lighting and large wall advertisements replacing the open atrium
approaching the hangar entrance with view of space exterior through windows

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dimly lit corridor toward the hangar bay, passing large advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: large illuminated poster for Crusader Industries
yellow directional sign pointing to elevators
large metal doors leading to the hangar bay

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bright atrium for a darker, enclosed corridor lined with large illuminated advertisements. The lighting shifts to artificial neon as the character approaches the hangar entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: hangar observation deck with view of space and docking facilities

events.description: entering the hangar observation deck with large windows revealing space and stars outside

agents.ego_description: walking along the observation deck while viewing the space exterior through large windows

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows showing the exterior space view
dark space with stars and station structures visible outside
large pink illuminated advertisement visible through the window
white curved bench for waiting passengers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious hangar observation deck with massive windows revealing the darkness of space outside. The area features seating benches and views of exterior holographic billboards and space station structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile, enclosed interiors of a space station lobby into a vast observation deck overlooking the void of space. It begins in a lobby with red neon signage, moving through a narrow metallic corridor lined with glass display cases and potted plants under cool industrial lighting. As the ceiling opens up to skylights, the camera transitions into a spacious central atrium where the character traverses an elevated walkway past a massive holographic planet display and garden beds. The scene then shifts back into a darker, enclosed corridor illuminated by neon advertisements before finally opening into a wide hangar observation deck. This final space features massive windows that reveal the darkness of space, exterior holographic billboards, and the sprawling structures of the station.
